title: Latest News
description: Sample news feed. Admins: add new entries at the top (or anywhere — the feed sorts by date) and push to publish.

items.title: Belgium Schengen visa fee guidance updated
items.summary: VFS Global centres in India continue to process Belgium short-stay visa applications; standard processing remains around 15 days for complete applications.

items.title: Brussels Airport Express train remains fastest airport link
items.summary: The Airport Express train continues to be the quickest way from Brussels Airport into the city centre, taking around 18 minutes to Brussels-Central.

items.title: Diwali celebrations planned across Brussels and Antwerp
items.summary: Indian associations in Brussels and Antwerp are preparing community Diwali events — check the Community & Festivals section closer to the date.

items.title: STIB MOBIB card contactless payment expanding
items.summary: Contactless bank card payment continues to roll out across STIB buses and trams as an alternative to the MOBIB card.

items.title: New academic year: student visa reminders for KU Leuven and other universities
items.summary: Indian students admitted to Belgian universities are reminded to apply for their student visa well ahead of the academic year start.
